name: read_memory
desc: Read Claude's persistent memory. Scopes: 'global' (user prefs, business logic, skillset), 'domain' (discipline-specific — provide domain key like '63_lighting'), 'chat' (this conversation), 'all'. Use 'list_domains' scope to see available domain folders.

parameters.name: file
parameters.description: For global scope: user_preferences, business_logic, or skillset

parameters.name: domain
parameters.description: For domain scope: folder name e.g. '63_lighting', '52_drainage', '57_ventilation'
